name: Baked Macaroni & Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare macaroni according to package directions; drain.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F, spray shallow broiler safe 2 1/2 quart casserole with non stick cooking spray.
3. Blend cottage cheese until smooth using a food processor with knife blade attached.
4. In a 2-quart saucepan, mix flour with 1/4 cup milk until smooth. Slowly stir in remaining milk until blended. Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently until mixture just boils and thickens slightly.
5. Remove from heat, stir in cottage cheese, cheddar cheese, salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
6. Place macaroni in casserole; cover with cheese sauce. Bake uncovered for 20 minutes. Turn off oven control to broil.
7. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese and serve.
